title: PvP Basics
description: MAXIMALLY vanilla, all-in-one PvP pack. Features: small fire and pop, and more!
body:
![banner pvp basics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/756f96ebb2ed06b28f475dee96a14f2f098e6351.png)

[![discord-singular](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/social/discord-singular_vector.svg)](https://dsc.gg/spectrr3)
[![modrinth-gallery](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/documentation/modrinth-gallery_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pvp-basics/gallery)
[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/pvp-basics)
  
A pack that combines 15+ pvp base packs, as for me, everyone should have this pack.  
### Features:
- Blue glowstone dust
- Clear powered snow overlay
- Darker cobweb
- Low fire on ground and firstperson
- Low soul sand fire on ground and firstperson
- Low shield
- No bobber
- No smoke
- No particle explosions
- No particle effects
- No eating particles
- [Old Enchant Glint](https://modrinth.com/project/xayK2IoV)
- Quiet sounds of explosions
- Small totem pop
- Smaller totem particles

### Why PvP Basics?

PvP Basics is the most vanilla resource pack, without excess, there is nothing in it that you might not need, like **mini items** or some kind of **modified crosshair**, if you need it, download it separately, my resource pack combines everything you need for ALL types of PvP, without **excess**.
![before](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe1c14f60fe8cb141268d7ae318c3d1b19c834d.png)

### Information:

Pack version 1.15-26.2 (but in version lower 1.20 resource pack it will be displayed as "Made for an oder version of Minecraft", I am aware of this, but I can't do anything.)  
  
PvP Basics already has Low Fire, Low Shield, Small Totem *pop*, etc. built in. You **DON'T HAVE TO** use separate packs with similar features.  
  
If your fire looks uncorrected, try to put all the other packs on a small fire.  
The size of the totem can be adjusted using the [Totem Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/project/1cfO6J6t) mod.  
Or make it small through the pack [Small Totem](https://modrinth.com/project/O1D0aeBl),  
but  the Small Totem resource pack should be placed above PvP Basics.  
If you want to turn off the sounds of explosions, you can use the resource pack [No Explosion Sounds](https://modrinth.com/project/Y7ve2Sdj).   
The armor, inventory, and potion HUD can be added using the [inventory hud+](https://modrinth.com/project/Kp2uclYl) mod.  
### Guides by pvp types:
- [Crystal](https://youtu.be/pERpMJMlTVU?si=_NJDPV7Fj1NKvNXL).
- [Mace](https://youtu.be/u3ar9ByPUX8?si=cb7NmJjgdASzXBYK).
- [Cart](https://youtu.be/Nzw7sW5NIJg?si=JCwg9Ue3Z-nc3n5N).
